name: create
_note: sponsorship.create (server.js:76526, MACROS/runMacro path) INSERTs a CC sponsorship obligation into npc_sponsorships against a real migrated DB — the assassin runs with an internal owner actor so a valid call returns ok:true (no no_db / no_actor). A real npcId is required; monthlyCc must be > 0 (0/negative reject as missing_inputs). currency is always 'CC'. MONEY-PATH GUARD (landed 2026-06-27): monthlyCc/dispatchFreqHours now fail CLOSED before the INSERT — a finite-but-absurd value (1e308) or non-finite (Infinity/NaN) or > 1e6 or negative rejects as `invalid_numeric:<field>`, so no poisoned CC obligation can be persisted and Math.floor(Infinity)→NULL is unreachable. The /lenses/sponsorship lens never calls this DB-backed macro — it drives the LENS_ACTIONS domain (server/domains/sponsorship.js, in-memory, no user-supplied amount), which is fail-CLOSED by construction (all CC comes from the seeded tier ladder).
